signals.headline: Rakuten Wallet Launches XRP Payment Integration | YES | HIGH confidence**
signals.raw:
Rakuten Wallet Launches XRP Payment Integration | YES | HIGH confidence**
On April 15, 2026, Rakuten Wallet went live with XRP as both a listed asset and payment method, reaching 44 million Rakuten Pay users and 5 million merchant locations[1]. Rakuten's 3 trillion loyalty points ($23B in circulation) can now convert directly to XRP[1].

signals.headline: Six Spot ETFs Achieve ~$1B Combined AUM | YES | HIGH confidence**
signals.raw:
Six Spot ETFs Achieve ~$1B Combined AUM | YES | HIGH confidence**
Six U.S. spot XRP ETFs are now active with approximately $1 billion in combined assets under management and 787 million XRP in custody as of mid-April 2026[1]. Week-ending April 11 saw intraday ETF inflows hit $119.6M, the strongest since December[1].
